title: Diplectria barbata
taxonomy: Diplectria barbata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the order Gentianales. The genus Diplectria is part of the family Rubiaceae, which includes plants commonly known as coffee and gardenias. Diplectria barbata is native to the tropical regions of the Americas. Its classification is also supported by its characteristics, such as having opposite leaves and small, fragrant flowers.
